description: Pivot to Python eval library (v0.1). Meta-harness prereqs (Sprint 0) then Python build (Sprints 1-6). See .harness/spec.md and C:/Users/akino/.claude/plans/c-users-akino-downloads-compass-artifac-dapper-muffin.md for full design.

phase_01_archive.result: 5/5 sprints PASS, 53/53 criteria, 92% first-round pass rate

sprints.title: Meta-harness prereqs: statistical trials, tasks.json, adaptive thinking, transcript capture
sprints.scope_notes: Upgrades the meta-harness itself so its verdicts on the Python build are statistically valid. All changes to plugins/trine-eval/ (skills, agents, hooks) and .harness/config.json. Adds trials-vs-retries separation, tasks.json schema per sprint criterion, Opus 4.7 with adaptive thinking on all agents, full transcript serialisation to .harness/transcripts/.

sprints.title: Python library bootstrap + core primitives
sprints.scope_notes: First sprint creating src/trine_eval/. pyproject.toml uv-managed. Pydantic primitives, decorator registry, Anthropic wrapper with Opus 4.7 default + effort tier + interleaved thinking. Thinking-block round-trip enforced by unit test.

sprints.title: Runner, replayable logs, pytest plugin, observability
sprints.scope_notes: Runner with hard caps; msgpack binary + JSON replayable log; deterministic seed plumbing; OpenTelemetry spans exported to self-hosted Langfuse (ops/langfuse-compose.yaml); pytest plugin with exit code 100 on failure; G4 cost reporting.

sprints.title: Prompt caching and Batch API
sprints.scope_notes: Compass P1s promoted to v0.1 per user decision. cache_control breakpoints on system prompt + tools + golden examples. Batch API default for offline runs, stacks with caching. F6 enforcement: interleaved thinking survives batch round-trip byte-identical.

sprints.title: LLM-as-judge: CoT rubric, binary scores, bootstrap CI, three-tier grading, calibration
sprints.scope_notes: Single-judge-with-rubric mode at v0.1. E3/E4/E7 (pairwise position-swap, verbosity mitigation, self-consistency) explicitly deferred. Calibration gate: 50-item set under tests/fixtures/calibration/ must hit TPR+TNR >= 1.5.

sprints.title: Docker sandbox + cheap pre-filter + regression-safety gate
sprints.scope_notes: Per-sample container with network=none; four-stage pipeline (ruff -> mypy -> AST diff -> tests); short-circuits on failure with structured reason; pre-patch FAIL_TO_PASS/PASS_TO_PASS capture; any PASS_TO_PASS -> FAIL is automatic fail.

sprints.title: SWE-bench Verified adapter + pass@k unbiased estimator + calibration run
sprints.scope_notes: Load SWE-bench Verified v2.0.3+. pass@k via Chen-et-al. unbiased estimator with n>=k samples (default n=5). 50-instance calibration targeting 84.6-90.6% (published Opus 4.7 = 87.6%). D6 contamination disclosure in README. trine-eval report <run> prints G4 metrics.
